emails.subject: Re: Absence
emails.body: Fear not my friend. You are not forgotten. Gary will be taking care of it in my absence. He has done it before and knows who to call should he incur any problems. TC Enron North America Corp. From: Tana Jones 04/14/2000 08:54 AM
